Very few people can say that So what is mysticism? It's the meta of knowledge. It's a study that goes beyond behavior, beyond psychology and beyond philosophy and even beyond religion...and explores the very depth of who we really are...also known as the soul.... From this vantage point...the vantage point of the soul....you attain powers that are Godly. Nothing can stop you. Not a bad day. Not a bad habit. Not an addiction. Not a pathology. The soul is perfectly pristine and untouchable. The soul will take you to every dream you could imagine... The key is knowing how to access it. For instance. Do you know where your soul is? For 3,000 years this knowledge has been known to a few. but never shared with the masses. and never used for personal gain. I'm about to change that. I already have. My story alone is enough to prove what mysticism can do. Just 10 years ago I was not just broke. I was in debt to the IRS to the tune of 100 thousand dollars. I had not even a dream of paying this off. I was going to be in debt forever. So I thought. Then I developed bipolar disease. Manic episodes landed me in great danger and even in jail. My wife divorced me and I lost access to my 5 children for the majority of their lives. I couldn't have been more dejected. That was when I decided to apply the mysticism I had learned to my actual life. And within a week of doing that...something happened...I made 250 dollars in day just fooling around on the internet... And then I blew that strategy up and wound up making 100K dollars a month...putting me well on track to becoming a millionaire. I'm going to share the exact strategy I used so you can use it too....and hopefully get the results I got...this involves no...

rawTextReference: Name of Product: Ultra Beta Cell Headlines: What Can Dolphins Teach Us About Reversing Diabetes? The answer will change everything or Dolphins Can Turn Off Their Diabetes Like A Light Switch. Why Can't We? The answer will shock you or Something In Dolphins' Brains Allows Them To Turn Off Their Diabetes Like A Light Switch? What if you could too? ============================The copy======================= "I'm sorry sir....you have diabetes Type 2" These are the seven words you pray to God will never come out of your doctor's mouth. When I heard them it felt like Mike Tyson punch had punched me in the gut. I got all shaky. Lost my balance. Felt like I was going to faint. I was in shock. This wasn't supposed to be happening to me....and my life would never be the same... As far as I knew at the time, there was no way to "walk-back" diabetes. To me, this was a life sentence... A whirlwind of thoughts consumed me... What kind of diet would I have to go on? Would I ever eat a Twix again? Would I need special socks? How much do those cost? Would I have to start pricking myself each morning? Because I can't stand the sight of blood. What would I tell my wife? What would I tell my kids? Would there be comas in my future? Amputations? (insert worrying about the future talk) ...tears welled up in my eyes. My days of living were over. The rest of my life would just be just coping. I blamed myself. I ate at Dunkin Donuts every day for breakfast. That couldn't have helped. But couldn't God have at least given me a warning sign? Did I have to go from having a bit of a belly, to diabolically diseased in 5 seconds... It seemed unfair. I'm Harris Schieffer, I'm not a doctor. But I will say I know my science...I'm a marine biologist. We go through just as much biology and anatomy as any doctor or any veterinarian. (list his qualifications) We are the M.D.s of the sea... And unlike real doctors, our education isn't bought and paid for by megalomanic pharmaceutical corporations. We have to address diseases in animals with only what nature has given us.... Which brings me to the following warning: If you have diabetes, this will, without a doubt, be the most important presentation you ever watch. It will shake the foundations of everything you thought you knew about diabetes... And it's also, without a doubt, that corporate interests will have this video taken down. Here's how it will happen. Big Pharma can't just take us down. But big Pharma has, let's say, a cushy relationship the FDA which is the Food and Drug Administration. The FDA is the indomitable watchdog for all new medically related products. Eli Lilly for instance makes 50 billion dollars a year off diabetes products. When someone from their ranks sees this video, and believes it could cut into their companies' profits they will send a link to this video to the FDA. The FDA doesn't even need any evidence of wrongdoing. They will simply send a letter to us threatening litigation....and with their unlimited government budget we will have no choice but to comply, cease and desist, and take this video down. We are David. They are Goliath. And Goliath tends to win these battles. See big Pharma doesn't want you to have options. They are happy when your only option is their drugs and glucometers. They certainly don't want you looking to the ocean for your answers. But unfortunately for them that's the first place I look.... My specialty is actually corals... We all know corals are stunningly beautiful. But did you know that Coral reef plants and animals are important sources of new medicines that are being developed all the time to treat cancer, arthritis, human bacterial infections, Alzheimer's disease, heart disease, and other "unsolvable" diseases. So why wasn't anything being developed for diabetics? Because let me tell you, we needed it as badly as anymore... I lived with diabetes for 2 and a half years. And I never got used to it. My blood sugar remained erratic and I wasn't producing enough insulin. The doctor told me to do cardio. So, I ran two miles day... He said to eat healthy, so I went on the Mediterranean diet. Both of these changes did little to keep my diabetes at bay.... One of the scariest parts of my diabetes was the prospect of losing my eyesight... This became a very real fear one night when I almost hit an oncoming car... I swerved at the last second and saved 2 lives doing so.... I just didn't see him coming... I walked in the door crying... I don't think I'd cried in decades...my wife Elena held me tight and asked me what's wrong? I said: "Sweety. I don't think I can drive at night anymore. I don't even know if I can drive during the day..." Do you realize how quickly your independence as a human being can just go up in smoke when you have diabetes? Do you understand what it means when your wife has to ferry you around anytime you have to go to the pharmacy. She loses her independence as well... I never appreciated my eyes like I did then... I...

Knowing full well...we're going down the very same path they are. REGULAR POWER POINT SLIDES BEGIN AT THIS POINT With all these historically tragic events happening. You wouldn't be crazy for asking yourself some basic questions.. Questions like... What if I'm forced to go without power? For a week... For a month... Would I make it? Would my family make it? What if my family became unable to afford our grocery bill.. Could I survive? Could all of us survive? What if I .. Woke up without a home. How would I protect myself and my family from the elements. For over 634,000 Americans this year. These questions aren't theoreticals. These are realities. I know... we don't even bring up these questions with our spouses. But the questions nag at us, nonetheless. At a gut level. As a matter of instinct. Each one of us feels an urge to do something... anything to prepare...for what's coming to our neighborhood. Would you believe these guys admit and BRAG to me about about how they pack up FREE wordpress plugins anyone could download on Google. and sell it off to you as an upsell for $297? Believe it people... This crap.. this is the ONLY reason you're still getting hosed online.. And the sea of b.s. out there....has you convinced that REAL money making software doesn't even exist.. But I'm here to tell you the real deal... It DOES exist. You've just never come anywhere near it...until today.. And when you DO have a REAL money making software system in place.. you have no idea how fun life get's...and how fast everything in your life can turn around on a dime... It's like Anothing you've ever seen... Because I promise you...and I stake my entire reputation on this ONE promise.. ....all you need to do is you click ONE BUTTON... I said "ONE BUTTON" to activate the software...and EVERYTHING..i mean EVERYTHING is done for you.. nd from that...

rawTextReference: BS"D ________________________Script Begin____________________________ I"m Dr. Woolner. And if you take fish oil, this video won't just save you money...it could save your life. Fish oil. You're either taking it, or thinking about taking it. It's the hottest supplement of the decade. But... There's a dark cloud hanging over the fish oil industry...one that very few people know about.. A closely guarded secret, that's hurting millions of innocent Americans...just because they don't know better. 99% percent of major fish oil brands are affected by this problem...so it doesn't really matter which one you buy...it's affecting you. The sad truth is, the fish oil you're taking could be doing you more harm than good. Don't get me wrong. The good fish oil can do is tremendous. From your belly to your brain, fish oil benefits every aspect of health in the human body. Hundreds of studies have been done to prove that. . For instance, many of you came to this page looking for help with joint pain, arthritis or osteoporosis A study recently published at Oxford showed that the omega 3s in fish oil reduce pain and inflammation by 43% (show the citation under the text) ● Cardiovascular Benefits of Omega-3 Fatty Acids. rawTextReference: America's Favorite doctor discovers that one morning shot of this "liquid gold" acts as a vaccine to an epidemic ruining lives for 50 years... Opener #1 what if everything you thought you knew about your health was a lie? Opener #2 Are you living? or are you surviving? Are you loving each day you're on this earth? Or are you waiting for the day to be finally over. one tiny decision you'll make today will decide between which life you have from now until it's all over. Opener #3 "How are you doing?" (woman's voice) Are you sick of people asking you that question? Because every time you hear it you ask yourself: Should I say "good"? Should I say fine?" Boy I'd love to tell them how I really feel. Like I'm living in a black cloud of misery. My heart goes out to you. It's an epidemic. It's raging. And you a victim. This epidemic hits different people in different ways.. But it all can be pinpointed to one single chemical event happening in your body every second of the day... This epidemic makes living life into a living hell.. You can't put your finger on it... But you know you're just not right. You're stressed. Depressed. Overweight, You have low blood pressure. High blood pressure. Low libido. Low energy. It's hard to fall asleep and even harder to wake up. Maybe diabetes has even got you. You're often "tired yet wired." It's been this way so long you've come to accept it. It's called "getting older" you tell yourself. Life just isn't what it was when you were a teenager and you f igure it never will be. The sad fact is you could be feeling a lot better. You could have a spring in your step and a flat belly and the high energy of your teenage self. But this epidemic is robbing you of that possibility...and you don't even know it... In fact your doctor has know idea this epidemic even exists. Because it doesn't show up on blood tests. It's invisible to all but the most trained eye. And it's ruining lives. I mean ruining quality of lives. But lives themselves as well. People are actually aging faster because of this epidemic and therefore dying sooner. It's robbing you of what should be your twilight years. "no sweetie. we can't go to the beach today" "no sweetie. i can't play that game today" no sweetie. i'm too old to start that hobby. but you're not too old. And you know it. You know you're not able to give what you used to be able to give...to your kids, to your husband to your wife, to your parents. To yourself. And I've got news for you. All this? It's not your fault. As i'll explain. Your body has turned against you. You're your own worst enemy. We tire faster. We're putting on weight and have no hope of losing it. What if I told you there is only one reason for all of this. And that a "golden root" holds the key to a completely new life. A life with filled with verve. Where the weight just falls off of you. With a slim belly or maybe even a six pack. With an inner calm sensation that no drug (legal or illegal) can possibly give you. I'm Dr. Josh Levitt. i have a degree in physiology from UCLA a doctorate in naturopathic medicine from the top University in the field (Bastyer) and I am a clinical preceptor at Yale university You could say I offer something very few doctors can. Because I've been trained by both sides of the aisle. Western medicine. And eastern medicine. These two might not get along. But I love them both.... I've taken a "best of both worlds" approach to address my patients problems for over (# of years). I've come to love medicine as an art form. Each patient is a fertile, entirely new world for me to explore. And I don't stop exploring until I have pinpointed my patient's true problem, and put them on track to full health. I have developed a variety of new tests that target exactly what most Western and Eastern doctors are missing. In addition to my clinical work, I am an author, advisor, product formulator, and consultant in the health and wellness industry. I am the author and creator of many popular books, programs, articles, and videos all of which I think demonstrate my passion and commitment to helping you achieve your health and wellness goals. And my hard work led me to discover the "golden root" which I now require every single one of my patients to take. Because there's an epidemic raging. What is this epidemic? It's caused by two pyramid shaped glands right above your kidneys. These, I call the "unsung" heroes. They're called your adrenal glands. If you've heard of them, you've probably heard of them in connection with JFK and his struggle with Addison's disease. You might have also heard that these are responsible for cortisol production. What you may not know is how it's affecting your life right now. For instance, if you're having mood swings during the day that's a cortisol problem. It goes back to your adrenal glands If you're overweight, that goes back to your cortisol and adrenal glands as well. If you experience cravings, and can't seem to put that fork down....

rawTextReference: Are you suffering with any kind of joint pain? Is it starting to affect your life? New research suggests that this may be a lot worse than you thought. And it may just kill your dreams and everything you hold dear.... You'll find out why in a minute... But first I want to tell you about Marc. Marc had joint pain so bad he couldn't get out of bed...he would literally wake up screaming in agony.... The throbbing. The burning. The shooting. He felt like his joints were on fire. He couldn't work. He could play golf. He could barely play bingo. Then...Marc was let in on a certain "secret"...that's been proven (but not publicized) by multiple M.I.T. professors. He implemented this "secret" for just 7 days. Fast forward to today. He's now playing golf, and picking up his grandkids and tossing them around like stuffed monkeys... He says he feels like he's "25 again" and is completely "pain free." He says he had never felt better in his life. What is that secret? For that you'll have to watch this video just a little longer... For the rest of you who aren't Marc. I have 4 words for you... Joint. Pain. Kills. Dreams. Don't take it lightly. How many dreams of yours has it killed yet? The dream of aging without pain...gone. The dream of being able to play with your grandkids long into your 80s...gone. The dream of ever getting a good night's sleep from now until you die....gone... You don't want to talk about it. You don't even want to think about it... Something as simple as walking is a challenge. Something as commonplace as driving leaves you in oodles of pain.. And pulling weeds is a foregone notion. You certainly can't run like you used to. Or you're not there yet. Maybe you just have some early pain in the joints in your hand or your ankle. Maybe it hasn't really "hit" yet. But you live in fear of what will happen when it does... I'm not trying to scare you...but we must face the reality that joint pain gets worse and it spreads. That means you need to stop it before it affects the parts of you that are most important to you... You have an uneasy feeling inside... Maybe it's something you can't get your mind off of. A source of worry and anxiety that won't let up. It's the most debilitating disease of them all. And I'm so sorry you are struggling with it. My heart goes out to you. And I made this presentation just FOR you. And I can say for sure...this video will be the most important address you ever hear. But I'm warning you...this presentation is not for the faint of heart. Some of this information will shock you. Some of this information will make you angry. But in the end...I think you'll find...that this information is the most important information you've ever received. Because the strategies of the past have left you hopeless, hapless, enfeebled and in pain. Giving you no hope of a cure. Only ways to mask the problem. We can do better.... And it starts now... Aside from learning the root cause of joint pain... Which is a major accomplishment. You're going to learn something else. I call this the "silent killer"....It's something you actually do to YOURSELF without realizing it. You're probably doing it right now. And it's making your joint pain much worse. Simply stop it. And reverse it. And your joint pain will improve. Isn't that a nugget of information worth sticking around for? I think so. Listen. I know how desperate you are for a fix. Joint pain destroys your quality of life. It destroys your life period. And nobody will truly understand what you're going through. Not your doctor... Not your family... Not anyone.... You feel alone. When will it get better, you ask yourself? Other ailments seem to get better with time. But this one doesn't. It just spreads. In Nov. 9, 2009 Nature Medicine published a study which found that -- "Cells surrounding joints affected by joint pain may spread the disease to other joints by traveling through blood vessels. joint pain, it found, is a progressive disease that causes joint inflammation and destruction. Researchers say initially the disease starts out in just a few joints but soon spreads to other joints in the body. Cells called synovial fibroblasts may be to blame You see that study and wonder...will it ever get so bad that I lose my independence altogether? (SHOW AN IMAGE OR VIDEO CLIP OF SOMEONE BEING PUSHED IN A WHEELCHAIR) You look around. And you don't see many options. The prescription drugs have addiction as a side effect. Maybe you've heard about the opioid epidemic. Do you want to be another addict added to the ranks? Some of these drugs cause problems even worse than joint pain. NSAIDs for instance, relieve pain, but can increase your chances of having a heart attack or stroke. All NSAIDs can be hard on the stomach and can sometimes result in a stomach bleeding. Corticosteroids Corticosteroids reduce inflammation. Some possible side effects include glaucoma (increased pressure in the eye), cataracts (clouding of the lens of the eye), fluid...

rawTextReference: Warning: This video contains real footage of graphic violence and death. Please watch this video alone, and away from children or any sensitive viewers. [With FB, Google, Yahoo (even Beck) clampdown on not "scaring" their audience we'll likely need to consider 2-step into these videos w quiz, etc.] [Do we want a new beginning slide here or is a two-step process okay?] -INTRO: GUN OWNERS- [Video to use: http://www.liveleak.com/view?i=1ab_1469287963 (or something similar like: http://theync.com/murder/man-fighting-with-cop-shoots-him-directly-in-the-head.htm)] What you're seeing is security camera footage taken outside a restaurant. The man in the top right corner with his back to you is an off-duty police officer. This man was surely well trained in the use of his firearm, and we know that he was concealed carrying at the time of this incident. The thugs who murdered him knew this, and you can see them running off with his weapon. This attack happened in an instant. Even though he had his service weapon on him... He did not have time to use it. My name is Tim. I train groups of soldiers, police, Navy SEALS, and private citizens in a form of personal protection called Target Focus Training. They learn to identify threats, and use the tool of violence to protect themselves against attacks like the one we just witnessed. When I say "The Tool of Violence" - I want you to understand that violence is a tool. And like any other tool, it can either be used for good or for evil. A hammer can help you build a home - or it can help you break car windshields. A blowtorch can help you thaw frozen pipes, or it can help you burn down a church. Consider these two scenarios - It's a test of your moral compass, and it will show you how extreme violence can be a tool just like any other: Scenario #1: A man forces his way into a home. There is a woman inside the kitchen. Her husband is at work, her young child is upstairs. The man demands she give him all her valuables. When he doesn't get what he wants fast enough, he gets angry. He's frustrated with her, he's irate... He grabs her by the neck and begins to choke her. He sees a butcher knife on a cutting board on the counter. He grabs the knife, and buries it in her neck, and she bleeds out on the floor. Now, obviously, this man is a monster that should be tried and punished to the fullest extent of the law. If there's a death penalty in this state, he should probably get it. But here's the other scenario - it starts the same way - A man forces his way into a home. There is a woman inside the kitchen. Her husband is at work, her young child is upstairs. The man demands she give him all her valuables. When he doesn't get what he wants fast enough, he gets angry. He's frustrated with her, he's irate... He grabs her by the neck and begins to choke her. She remembers that there's a butcher knife on a cutting board on the counter, and it's within reach. She grabs it, and buries it in the back of the man's neck - he collapses instantly, and bleeds out on the floor. Now - what punishment does she deserve? She used the exact same tool of violence that the violent attacker used. Both scenarios have a butcher knife going into a neck and killing a person. But we'd lock the intruder up and possibly execute him - And the woman who protected herself in her own home and potentially saved not only her life but the life of the child upstairs? Hopefully the only thing we'd do to her as a society is offer her our thanks and praise for her bravery and ability to act decisively under pressure. In the hands of a violent attacker, yes, this information is dangerous. Yet in the hands of the more than 99% of us who would never attack another person, it's the only way to survive a terrible situation. My clients understand this. It's why law enforcement agencies and the military have hired me as a trainer... Because they know that there are situations where weapons simply cannot help. More importantly, they know that the most powerful weapon... Is the one between your ears. When you know how to inflict permanent injury... When you understand the universal weaknesses of the human body... When you look at an oncoming mob of attackers, and all you see is the joints that tear most easily... The vulnerability of your attackers sight or hearing.. The fragility of the human spinal cord... You become more dangerous than any two-bit thug with a gun. For the record, when I leave the house I bring the same four things you likely do. Wallet, keys, phone, and my Glock 9mm. However, if you truly want to protect yourself and the people you love... Then there's a fundamental, powerful, and lethal set of principles that you need to understand. People like you and me understand how important it is to be able to protect our homes and families. We understand, because we've looked into the void... We know that we wouldn't be able to live with ourselves if the worst happened, and we were not...

rawTextReference: With that click... Your life just got a whole lot easier. Welcome to 2020/21. We're still in the middle of a pandemic the likes of which the world has never seen. Businesses are failing. Hair salons. Coffee Shops. Manicurists. Arcades. Hardware stores. Are ALL hanging it up. And that's a crisis. The American way is teetering on the brink of oblivion. And yet... from all crises comes great opportunity. And this situation has given birth to... a 50 million dollar opportunity that is like no other... An opportunity to become financially free. Fast. Be honest. Are you feeling financially strapped right now? You're not alone. 52% of households are not sure if they can pay their rent this month. And you know what these people are doing when the bills come in their mailbox? They're turning to Mother Mastercard and Father Visa to put out the fire. They're putting it on the plastic. This is a bad situation,because these companies can be merciless when they don't get paid. They're just making a bad problem and making it worse... But I'm going to show you how...not in spite of that...but because of it.... A money-making opportunity has emerged that is unlike anything we've ever seen. And if you stick with me...for just a few minutes. I'm going to explain exactly how it works...and why you are in the perfect position to take advantage of it... and then I'm going to tell you how your life is going to change because of it. I know why you came here. You don't have to be a mind reader... You're here because you want to create an online business. What if I told you that was actually the SLOWEST way to become financially free? To understand why... Let me tell you about a man named William. William created a software that made it really easy to find your files on your computer and run countless other operations.... And if he had tried to build this business himself... ...you never would have heard of him today. Instead...he went to IBM. And they forged a partnership. He said "I need your brand. And you need my software if you want your customers to be happy." IBM was a huge company at the time. Selling billions of dollars worth of computers. They made the deal. And William installed his software into their hardware, to make it easier for the customer to operate their computer. Almost overnight William became a tech giant. And the money followed... He got paid every time an IBM was sold... I repeat. Every time an IBM was sold. And as a result... He's been in the top 3 richest men alive for decades... I'm sure you guessed that I'm talking about Bill Gates and Microsoft. So my question to you is... Can you do what he did? Can you "plug in" to an existing business that's worth tens of millions of dollars? And become financially free almost overnight? Because with the opportunity I'm going to share with you...people are making money on day 0. Without a product. Without copywriting. Without advertising. Without graphic design Without a warehouse. And yet...they're killing it... Isn't that faster and easier than building your own online business? Where you're all alone. Not exactly sure what you're doing wrong...but knowing it's not working... Isn't that faster and easier than competing with others who have been online for 20 years before you came around? Isn't that faster and easier than trying to find out what kind of website converts visitors to sales... and then have to figure out where to get those customers? It doesn't have to be that way... Something better is here... Something that lets you "plug in" just like William, and reap the rewards. What is this opportunity? I'll give you a hint as to what it is... (SHOW a few highlights of your interview on Larry King Live) We now know that we want to partner with a company much larger than our own. But why hook up with OUR company...Credit Secrets... Well it's because credit is the #1 cause of financial frustration in our entire financial lives. 63% of people are not happy with their credit score. And they're ready to do anything....so long as it makes sense...to make that credit score rise... Because a higher credit score means they can lease a brand new car, buy a home, remodel a home, buy a boat, pay for their child's college tuition, start a business, get better car insurance rates, get cellphones with no security deposit, get credit cards with extremely high limits, get better airfare prices, so much more, and of course bragging rights... Tell everyone at the cocktail party that your credit score is a solid 800. That's going to win you some jealousy, some oohs and ahhhs... a few friends...maybe even a date... If your credit is bad... it means you can't get a home...so you're stuck in your dingy apartment for life... Even if you could get a home, the interest you will pay will take you down, pummel you and make you wish you never got into the home buying business at all.. You'll pay MORE for life insurance health insurance, auto insurance. and it will severely lessen your...

"Washed Up 80's Rock Star SHREDS $xx,xxx Per Month Payload With 'Cut & Paste' Income Amplifier App!" *PROOF SHOTS* So... you wanna be a Rockstar, do ya. Trashing hotel rooms... Waking up surrounded by beautiful women... Touring in a beat-up van with 4 of the craziest SOBs you'll ever meet... That's the rock n roll dream. And back in the 80's it was all there for the taking. Sex, drugs and rock n roll-on demand. These days? I STILL live life like a rockstar but... ● I don't have a recording contract... ● I don't have to rely on song royalties... ● And I don't even have to play a single lick on my Gibson... Right now... I have other means... A Cash-Pulling 'App Of The Gods' That Helped Me Create The Greatest Rock n Roll Legend Never Told... *PROOF SHOTS* I don't know how you found this page. But what you're about to see and hear... ... is gonna blow your mind like Sgt Peppers did the time around. This ain't American Idol... This is The Beatles at Shea Stadium... Jimi at Woodstock... Cobain at Reading Festival... Because right here..on this page you find out how to generate the money you need...for whatever you need...at will... I'm talking about.. An income to instantly propel you to diamond-encrusted, Rockstar status... Now it's vital to know who you're listening to whenever somebody makes a bold claim like that...so let me give you the short long of it. Ever heard of Larry David--the creator of Seinfeld? He's the comedian's comedian. A comedy genius -- living off endless royalties from TV syndication-- and yet... he never made it big at stand-up. Well... a lot of folks say that was me back in the 80's. Rock stars looked up to me... household names wished they had my talent... and my global fanbase was RABID. But... I never quite made it into the big leagues. Never had that stroke of luck to catapult my band Suspicion into the stratosphere. It just wasn't meant to be. But being well-respected and 'on the inside' had its perks. I knew anyone who was anyone. The lead singers of KISS... Whitesnake... even Guns 'n' Roses... Anybody with big hair... giant riffs... and a weakness for 18 year old groupies... Funny... YOUR Ill Advised Attempts To Make Money Online Sorta Remind Me Of My Own 'Near Miss' 80's Heyday (Minus The Groupies)... Back then everybody wanted to live the dream. And everybody was copying everybody else. (Remind you of IM right now?) New "hair metal" bands used to spring up every day. Everybody getting together with their stoner buddies to form the 'next big thing'. And it never quite worked out. Just like this "making money" thing isn't working out for you. But you're a stubborn sumbitch, I can tell. Like me... you don't give up without a fight... And back in the 80's nobody was more stubborn than me. Some concert promoter refused to book me? I'd snap at his heels until he made me the opening act. I'd always find a way in. Kinda like how I made it online. I kept knocking at the door. Eventually....the internet gave way.. And when it did. The flood was uncontrollable... Now I know that to live the rock star dream... you don't HAVE to be a rock star. It's not the guitar licks... it's not the studio bust ups... it's not even the legions of groupies doing unspeakable things to you in the back of a tour bus... There's only one thing that make you a true rock n roll star... Paydays Like These (INSERT PROOF) I want to trash a hotel room? Have a different woman every night? It's done. Because once you've tasted $7000 bottles of wine... ... once you've spend\t your time globe-trotting from one tropical paradise to another... ... once you've smoking the finest Cuban cigars overlooking the Mediterranean... You'll NEVER turn back to ANYTHING that requires waking up before noon... Not when you've tasted the life of a Rock Star... That much I promise you.. But it's no wonder you've yet to experience that lifestyle. How could you when the guru's force-feed you "B-sides" all day long? It's like an endless parade of cringe-worthy "American Idol" auditions... And you can't blame the contestants. Those poor, hopeful girls and boys are like little lambs to the slaughter. They think they can rock it... But let's be honest... their auditions suck the fat one. I get you. I really do. You're lied to by every other sales page out there. And guess what? It won't ever stop. That's the crying shame of it all. Just like you can't stop people from trying to be MegaStars... You can't stop marketers from being posers... It's embarrassing. Ready for a different flavor....taste the Mick I do this sh*t for a living. Go ahead - Google me. Mick Moore. I'm a rarity. Because my success is real. And so is the success of my students. And guess what..the story is too. Realize the story you're hearing isn't a fantasy like the others...

Income above a certain point does lead to higher levels of happiness... Yet...after that point..more money seems to do more harm than good. Suicide rates and addiction rates are actually higher in wealthier neighborhoods than in poor ones... So is money good? Or is it bad? Well.. what I found is these studies fail to understand... Is that there are not 1, but 3 different kinds of rich... Who are all completely different animals... The first is the working rich... These are the ones who listened to their grandad and "earned it"...and "saved it..." And they continue to earn it and save it...from shift to shift..week to week...and year to year... If they want to make more money...they simply work more... and they do it at the expense of time for themselves and their families.. And then there is the old money rich... In fact...it leads to the dream life we've all been...well...dreaming of..... For this kind of rich every dollar they make is a unit of power....exchangeable for more energy...more freedom...more fun....more connection with nature...and more aliveness.. This kind of money.. It COMPLIMENTs your family...it COMPLIMENTs your health...and your longevity.... It's everything rich was always meant to be... This kind of rich has a name... And it's name is... Rich 2.0 And I honestly believe...if you become rich and powerful with the ancient secrets...it won't even be worth it.. Unless.. rawTextReference: Suggested names: TJ95 Tree5000 JuiceX10 Fat Sap Gold Jamba Golden Tree Gold 6000 Liver Blast Liver Buster Fat Blast 6000 Liver Detox 20 Fatty Liver 2.0 Liver 2.0 Fat Incinerator FatLiverX FL900 (for fatty liver) Headline: Delicious "Tree Sap" Sucks Up All The Fat In Your Fatty Liver While You Lose Up To 100 Pounds... The story you're about to hear...as fantastic as it is...is actually 100% true. My name is Lori Grunel. I'm not a saleswoman so I can't sell you on watching this video like the others do... ...I'm a real woman which means you can look me up on Facebook. I'm from Twin Falls, Idaho and I went through some hard times and then came out of it better for it... I am going to speak to you from the heart today, be really honest and pull no punches so please don't judge me and also try not to be offended. What's most important is that you watch this presentation all the way until the very end because it is like no other...and because that's where the real secret is revealed. Enjoy. Story begins: There I was. Lying sprawled out on the tiles of my newly polished floor. My recliner had just broke because it couldn't handle the weight... My weight. "This was it...I was literally at rock bottom..." I thought to myself. "Darn. My shoulder is throbbing. I think I sprained it in the fall..." Turns out I did... "Lori, Lori, are you okay? My husband Mike said with a sad mixture of concern and pity in his voice." It took me some time to get up... Now even watching Netflix has become a dangerous activity, I thought to myself. Furthermore, if a chair couldn't hold me...what man would want me? This was too embarrassing... When I told the doctor what had happened...my face was so beet red I thought it would catch fire... This is the type of thing I thought only happens in cartoons. I had to wear a sling for 2 weeks...and everyone who saw it asked me what happened... "I'd rather not say, was my standard response." Though what I really wanted to say was "I'd rather not say, dickhead". That sling was my mark of shame... I never felt lower... I couldn't look at that broken chair...but there it was... Reminding me of everything I wasn't.... We went shopping for a new loveseat and Mike saw one and was like "I think this one will handle you." "Handle me?", I thought. What was I, a sack of potatoes? I didn't say anything to him. I just let it fester. After all, I was the one who broke the chair... I lay in bed that night staring at the ceiling. This was bad. If I didn't get help now I knew I never would. My husband had already stopped having sex with me... Who knows? Maybe he's cheating on me right now with a woman who doesn't have a weight problem... Maybe she's a jogger. Wearing spandex. Maybe she's got a tight belly and a butt made of iron... They say life is miserable and it ends way too soon. Well my life was miserable and I wanted mine to end right now. As I lay there on the floor I thought about how many times I'd been lied to by people I trusted. My family doctor, my naturopath, Atkins, New Jersey Diet, Beachbody, P90X. I was told If I would just eat less and move more I'd look like Kendall Jenner... In fact I looked like I'd just eaten Kendall Jenner... I was 260 pounds, 5"6. (picture if you have) I had already been diagnosed with diabetes. That was old news. When the test came back I just shrugged my shoulders. This was just yet another reason why I wanted to kill myself. If not for my children I probably would have... Sure, I was mad. I mean I'd done everything they told me... Cutting calories? Did it. Doing cardio? All over it. Cutting out carbs? You know it. Intermittent fasting? Yup. Intermittent running? I ran a mile. Jenny Craig? For sure. New Jersey Diet? Hated it. Nutritionists? Tried every one in my neighborhood.. Atkins? You know it. Paleo? Like heck. It was with that last diet....the Paleo diet....that I completely gave up. Where would I go from here? Apparently, it didn't matter which diet or which strategy I tried. The love handles remained. It was as if they were mocking me. The only way I would see any change on the scale was when I starved myself for the day. So I would do that for two days. And then my mind started to go nuts with thoughts of Dunkin Donuts. It was like I was being battered with these thoughts. My stomach rumbled and everything I saw looked like a donut. Then I would cave. And when I caved, I binged. And when I binged I gained two pounds over what I was when I started. You can see how this is something that makes you want to put a revolver in your mouth and say sianara.. But I wouldn't. I had Sonny and Marty and Julia... They didn't deserve to grow up without a Momma. They didn't see me as fat. That was just Mommy. They actually like falling into my flabby arms... They weren't the problem... The problem is Mommy is about to lose Daddy any day now... When I hit 182 he seemed less interested in me in general... When I hit 240 he was in another world when I was around. The sad thing...

rawTextReference: It started a typical Sunday. I was watching the Browns on TV. I got up to get some dip. I walked into the kitchen and there it was... it was Lisa on the floor pale white and not breathing. "Oh my God Lisa!" I rushed to give her heart to heart resuscitation. I prayed every prayer I could pray that she make it out of this...that she should just wake up damnit. It was probably the 18th thrust when her eyes opened. She said "sweetie" "what happened to me?" I said, "you had a bit of a spill". But things are going to be okay. I immediately called for an ambulance... I thought about what had just happened here...and I couldn't help but feel it was my fault... I should've noticed how lethargic she was lately. How totally sapped of energy she was. And how dark she seemed. Was this on me? She was always a happy gal. A real spark plug. Everyone loved her for that... She always made you feel better when she walked in the room... But there was this damn weight she couldn't lose. These 80 pounds... and the aggravation in trying to lose it took its toll. It was like this weight problem took a piece of her soul... She tried everything. She read every entry on Google. She watched every video on YouTube. She went to doctors. She went to nutritionists. She went to hypnotherapists, psychotherapists, acupuncturists'. Ate kale, ate spinach, cut out carbs, tried Atkins, tried Paleo, tried Bulletproof...she tried shakes...she went to spin classes, lifted weights, jogged...she did everything but liposuction but she was getting very close to opting for that as well. But the scale never changed. Do you realize how frustrating it can be to try EVERYTHING and still see the scale at 222. It's like your heart has gone through a blender. Like God is out to get you. Like things will never get better. And every single day you get dressed and see that belly. It's like a monster to you now. It has more will power than you do. You'd do anything to get rid of it but it won't budge. You could see her trying to stay upbeat while dead inside. Floods of thoughts entered my mind. I was so angry. But there'd be a lot more to it that you'd think. Because they all told you it was all about metabolism. Maybe they told you it was about your thyroid. Maybe they told you it was about calories or carbs. And none of that really gets to the root of the problem. Because there is a predator running through your veins. A cell that, when activated, will absolutely not let you lose weight...and in fact adds pounds every time you eat...no matter what you eat... How could everyone have missed it? rawTextReference: Suggested names: TJ95 Tree5000 JuiceX10 Fat Sap Gold Jamba Golden Tree Gold 6000 Liver Blast Liver Buster Fat Blast 6000 Liver Detox 20 Fatty Liver 2.0 Liver 2.0 Fat Incinerator FatLiverX FL900 (for fatty liver) Headline: Delicious "Tree Sap" Sucks Up All The Fat In Your Fatty Liver While You Lose Up To 100 Pounds... The story you're about to hear...as fantastic as it is...is actually 100% true. My name is Lori Grunel. I'm not a saleswoman so I can't sell you on watching this video like the others do... ...I'm a real woman which means you can look me up on Facebook. I'm from Twin Falls, Idaho and I went through some hard times and then came out of it better for it... I am going to speak to you from the heart today, be really honest and pull no punches so please don't judge me and also try not to be offended. What's most important is that you watch this presentation all the way until the very end because it is like no other...and because that's where the real secret is revealed. Enjoy. Story begins: There I was. Lying sprawled out on the tiles of my newly polished floor. My recliner had just broke because it couldn't handle the weight... My weight. "This was it...I was literally at rock bottom..." I thought to myself. "Darn. My shoulder is throbbing. I think I sprained it in the fall..." Turns out I did... "Lori, Lori, are you okay? My husband Mike said with a sad mixture of concern and pity in his voice." It took me some time to get up... Now even watching Netflix has become a dangerous activity, I thought to myself. Furthermore, if a chair couldn't hold me...what man would want me? This was too embarrassing... When I told the doctor what had happened...my face was so beet red I thought it would catch fire... This is the type of thing I thought only happens in cartoons. I had to wear a sling for 2 weeks...and everyone who saw it asked me what happened... "I'd rather not say, was my standard response." Though what I really wanted to say was "I'd rather not say, dickhead". That sling was my mark of shame... I never felt lower... I couldn't look at that broken chair...but there it was... Reminding me of everything I wasn't.... We went shopping for a new loveseat and Mike saw one and was like "I think this one will handle you." "Handle me?", I thought. What was I, a sack of potatoes? I didn't say anything to him. I just let it fester. After all, I was the one who broke the chair... I lay in bed that night staring at the ceiling. This was bad. If I didn't get help now I knew I never would. My husband had already stopped having sex with me... Who knows? Maybe he's cheating on me right now with a woman who doesn't have a weight problem... Maybe she's a jogger. Wearing spandex. Maybe she's got a tight belly and a butt made of iron... They say life is miserable and it ends way too soon. Well my life was miserable and I wanted mine to end right now. As I lay there on the floor I thought about how many times I'd been lied to by people I trusted. My family doctor, my naturopath, Atkins, New Jersey Diet, Beachbody, P90X. I was told If I would just eat less and move more I'd look like Kendall Jenner... In fact I looked like I'd just eaten Kendall Jenner... I was 260 pounds, 5"6. (picture if you have) I had already been diagnosed with diabetes. That was old news. When the test came back I just shrugged my shoulders. This was just yet another reason why I wanted to kill myself. If not for my children I probably would have... Sure, I was mad. I mean I'd done everything they told me... Cutting calories? Did it. Doing cardio? All over it. Cutting out carbs? You know it. Intermittent fasting? Yup. Intermittent running? I ran a mile. Jenny Craig? For sure. New Jersey Diet? Hated it. Nutritionists? Tried every one in my neighborhood.. Atkins? You know it. Paleo? Like heck. It was with that last diet....the Paleo diet....that I completely gave up. Where would I go from here? Apparently, it didn't matter which diet or which strategy I tried. The love handles remained. It was as if they were mocking me. The only way I would see any change on the scale was when I starved myself for the day. So I would do that for two days. And then my mind started to go nuts with thoughts of Dunkin Donuts. It was like I was being battered with these thoughts. My stomach rumbled and everything I saw looked like a donut. Then I would cave. And when I caved, I binged. And when I binged I gained two pounds over what I was when I started. You can see how this is something that makes you want to put a revolver in your mouth and say sianara.. But I wouldn't. I had Sonny and Marty and Julia... They didn't deserve to grow up without a Momma. They didn't see me as fat. That was just Mommy. They actually like falling into my flabby arms... They weren't the problem... The problem is Mommy is about to lose Daddy any day now... When I hit 182 he seemed less interested in me in general... When I hit 240 he was in another world when I was around. The sad thing...

sourceFile: NHB Swipe/Inspiration Brewed Daily 6.29.16.docx
hookExcerpt: On Marriage & Married Life REMOVE THE WHOLE SECTION ON MARRIAGE.
structureNotes: Uses diagnostic questions to make the reader self-identify with the problem.
Connects claims with reasons, which is useful for mechanism-heavy prompts.
usefulTransitions: In general, avoid disputes like fire because that is what they are
All darkness was tailor-made specifically for you to fix, because you know how to fix it best
In your game, you may be suffering today because you seem to have lost your seeds
In His game, you scored loads of points today precisely because you planted so many seeds of growth
The answer is not to be, because God is the only real existence
rawTextReference: On Marriage & Married Life REMOVE THE WHOLE SECTION ON MARRIAGE. AND REMOVE ALL SECTION HEADINGS SEE ATTACHED PAIN DOCUMENT FOR FORMAT OF NUMBER AND ITS FONT AND WHERE COFFEE CUP GOES. 1. Succeeding at marriage will be the hardest and most important thing you ever do. Some say, and I think it's true, that "shalom bayis" (a peaceful home) is the entire purpose of creation. 2. To succeed at marriage you can't be passive. You need to do stuff - lots of stuff - DAILY. Things like the following: i.Non-sexual contact. ii.Compliments. iii.Gifts iv.Arranging to do things together. v.FAVORS...like giving her a day off or a morning off where you take care of the kids, or a massage. 3. Husbands and wives become experts at arguing with each other. They should be become experts at giving in. 4. The dynamic between a husband and wife is that the man is a giver, or a king, and his wife is a receiver, or a queen. They are total opposites, and totally perfect for each other. 5. There is no "better" or "worse" with intimacy with your spouse. That's the talk of the original snake in the Garden of Eden. There is only more unity or less unity. 6. On Arguments and Their Mediation 7. Whenever you see an argument happening, know that both sides have some truth to them. 8. Don't be on any side of an argument taking place. There is always truth and lies on both sides. If you can, try to find out the truth the lies within each side, and come up with a creative solution that satisfies the desires of both parties. In other words, to mediate a dispute, be a big supporter of BOTH sides. If you are unable to do that, simply seek a compromise. If you can't do that, simply stay out of it. Never take sides. Never get embroiled. In general, avoid disputes like fire because that is what they are. They can get out of control very quickly. 9. On Self-Improvement & Living Well 10. "I have always taught you that this world has a glass ceiling. It only looks rocky. You just need to remove false notions and you can soar as high as you might". 11. If you want to see God, look at your heart. It's beating hard. Something is generating the electrical power to do that. But what is the source of that power? It's unknown to science. The unknown source you are feeling is God physically bringing you back to life over and over at every moment with a new burst of energy. Each beat tells the story that God still needs you here, enthusiastically. No matter how far off track you've gone, that beat will still be there, reminding you of how much He believes in you. 12. When we see bad in a person, we are actually looking in a mirror of our own problems in different clothes. God tried to get you to see it for yourself, but you didn't take time out for that kind of introspection. So you now are seeing its ugliness in someone else. This should cause you to wake up and launch a plan for self-improvement. 13. All darkness was tailor-made specifically for you to fix, because you know how to fix it best. The darkness ultimately brings light, and it reveals unused, underappreciated, and unknown talents. 14. To be honest, without your challenges and your struggles with them, your life wouldn't be worth living. If it were a movie, you'd want a refund. 15. My Rabbi used to say "humility is being what you are." No more, no less. This means that saying too little when it's time to speak up is actually a form of arrogance. You personally prefer to lay low, but your mission in that moment is to fly high. 16. Why can't you change the entire world? Anyone can! What's stopping you? It's just a matter of caring enough to care about everyone. And your caring, like God's, is unlimited. 17. If your car breaks down, you cry out in anguish - but it might be a gift from God. It may be the way he pushes you to go and buy the new car that suits you much better. When anything collapses in your life, keep your eyes open for the "new car". 18. Every little step we take, helps the entire situation. 19. "Pray for all of these people." 20. There are 7 billion people in the world, and no one can play your role. Make it your business to find out what your role is in this world and get into the part. 21. In your game, you may be suffering today because you seem to have lost your seeds. In His game, you scored loads of points today precisely because you planted so many seeds of growth. Search for the good that can come out of this long term. See the bigger picture. You can focus on the loss of the seeds or or the growth of the trees: it's your choice. 22. God wants to tell the greatest story ever told, and He has given you the part of the hero. The lights and the camera are ready; we are waiting for your action. Be a hero to someone today. 23. God isn't rubbing it in your face. He's scrubbing off the ingrained dirt that you've had too long to notice. 24. God: "My child, I chose you for this specific role for a reason." 25. It didn't just happen - it was DESTINED to happen. No matter what it is....

rawTextReference: Why Does God Allow Suffering? Everyone reading this has experienced suffering. So has the one writing it. Sometimes the most pious among us seem to suffer the most. And sometimes the ones who hurt others the most live best. So it's only human to ask, "Why does a good God allow bad things to happen to good people?" Rabbis don't like answering this question. Not because they can't. Because of the risk. If your brother's pain makes sense, it might not bother you the same way. In that case, it would be better to have no answer at all. So if you want to understand "why," you must promise me one thing. That in the face of others' pain, you will forget every explanation and just be silent. Just look into their eyes. Into the pain. And don't stop until they know for certain that you share in it. Until they know they're not alone. Also know, the true answer to any suffering can only come from the One who gave it, which is G‑d. He will reveal the true answers Himself one day in the Messianic era. Today, all we can do is learn the Torah He gave us, to gain a glimpse into His view of the world, as opposed to only seeing our own. Because when we start to dissolve those differences between ourselves and our Father in Heaven, we will surely find comfort. Let's begin. A group of boys decide to play a game of basketball. One boy doesn't hear so well. A ball is handed to him, so he puts it on the floor and kicks it hard to the other side of the court. The other kids turn to him angrily and say, "What the heck are you doing?" He says, "What do you mean? I just scored a goal." They say, "No, you didn't. You scored nothing, got us a penalty, and gave the other team control of the ball." The boy is confused and dejected. The issue? He was playing soccer. They were playing basketball. I call this problem "playing the wrong game." And "playing the wrong game" is the biggest mistake you can make in life. Whatever you face now, whether it be debt, hunger, addiction or disabilities, that's how G‑d "kicked the ball." You get angry and think something must be wrong with Him. Or with you. In truth, the only problem is the two of you are playing different games. Let's introduce them. You are playing a game called "My Perfect Life." Every day, you strive to have perfect health, perfect finances and the perfect marriage. Or as close as you can get to them. When suffering occurs, you're angry because that means your game is being ruined. What game is G‑d playing? It's called "The Perfect Story." G‑d wants to tell the greatest story ever told. He unfolds His story (history) like acts in a play. The story is full of drama. Heroes and villains. Victory and catastrophe. Sadness and joy. And we are told that it's all being recorded "above" like one big 7,000-year-long movie. So where are you in this game? You're on camera! You're an actor and He's the director. You've been in this movie the whole time. The problem is, you don't realize you're in it. You're playing the other game, so the director's instructions don't seem relevant. Meanwhile, there is no one who can play your role, and that's ruining this game. Until one day, you decide to listen. The words you hear affect you to the very core of your being. You begin to feel like you've awakened from a bad dream. You aren't who you thought you were. And your life isn't what you thought it was. Things begin to come into focus. This is what the Director said: "My child, I chose you for this specific role for a reason. I waited a long time for you to turn to Me and find out what it was. So I will tell you what it is. Your role was never to have the perfect life for yourself. Your role is to find a way to be a hero for someone else. What's a hero? Anyone who is willing to go beyond himself for the greater good. Anyone who is willing to put his personal desires aside, to fulfill My wishes for him. "What do I wish? I wish you would uplift others who h0ave fallen, with a kind word or a small act of charity. I wish you would feel grateful for all of the good that surrounds you, and that you would humbly accept the challenge to overcome the rest. I wish you would fight every day to defeat the demons I gave you, be they greed, lust, laziness or anything else. "Because I want you to know: buried underneath the jagged rocks I've put in front of you is hidden gold. It is in those darkest moments, when you see no way out, that all the souls who have passed, 'the great audience in heaven,' will be glued to the screen, crying for you, praying for you, waiting to see what you'll do and who you'll become. "And where will I be? Not behind the camera like any other director. I will be with you in that moment of pain. Experiencing it just as you do. Because we are not separate. We are one. And you will never be alone. I want you to hear My instructions, and listen to them, because I know that's what's best for you. I know because I created you. But even if you ignore everything I say, the love I have for you will...
